tips.text: Type @ to add a file to the context.
Generate a DEVOXXGENIE.md with /init for project-aware answers.
Discover and install MCP servers from the MCP Marketplace in Settings.
Enable Agent Mode to let DevoxxGenie read, search and edit files for you.
Turn on RAG in Settings to add semantic project context automatically.
Drag & drop images into the prompt when using a multimodal model.
Press Ctrl+Space to autocomplete a slash command.
Add the full project to context with large-context models like Gemini.
DevoxxGenie is open source — star it on GitHub and join us at Devoxx!
